prompt: Cute cozy illustration in warm flat gouache style with geometric simplified shapes, like modern children's book art. A serene bunny rabbit wearing dark Orthodox bishop robes and a small golden mitre, sitting peacefully at a wooden desk reading an ancient book by candlelight. Warm golden light fills the scene with sparkle stars. A cup of tea beside the book. Background: warm amber, burgundy, and orange geometric abstract shapes suggesting a cozy monastery cell with an arched window. The bunny has closed eyes, content expression, long ears. Style: flat color blocks, no outlines, warm saturated palette (amber, dusty pink, burgundy, gold, cream), soft geometric shapes, paper texture. Mood: sacred coziness, gentle wisdom. Vertical Pinterest format. No text.
